name: TestAcquireStatusLED
title: TestAcquireStatusLED
description: Can be used in standalone mode to assign the test module state to an LED.

parameters.name: ledBitMask
parameters.description: The LED that wants to be used. Available bit masks under xlAcquireLED.The LED’s Keypad S1 and Keypad S2 cannot be used for test modules.
